mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM user u
INNER JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.realName}, '%')
AND u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.email}, '%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.phone}, '%')
AND u.status = #{conditions.status}
AND ur.role_id = #{conditions.roleId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user WHERE id IN
#{id}
